apply_date.text: วันที่ข้อมูล

date_of_birth.text: วันที่ส่งกลับ

root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_cnt_m_coop.president_name, sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name, sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name,
sc_cnt_m_coop.tumbol_name , sc_cnt_m_coop.address, sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_name , sc_cnt_m_coop.telephone_no , sc_cnt_m_coop.postcode , sc_cnt_m_coop.fax_no, ('!date_of_birth_1!') AS date_return , to_date('!apply_date_1!','dd/mm/yyyy') AS date_where FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_cnt_m_coop, sc_mem_m_ucf_district, sc_mem_m_ucf_province WHERE (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) AND ( sc_cnt_m_coop.district_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_code) AND ( sc_cnt_m_coop.province_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code) AND ( sc_mem_m_ucf_district.province_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code) AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code <> '3' ) /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no between '073397' and '073411' order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no

r_ktm_book_shrlon_stroiet_wvo_nest_dep.sql: SELECT tab_dep.deposit_account_no , coalesce(tab_dep.total_balance, 0) as deposit_balance , tab_dep.deposit_name , tab_dep.membership_no FROM SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED left join ( SELECT sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no , creditor_item1.total_balance , sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name , sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no FROM sc_dep_m_rule ,sc_dep_m_creditor ,sc_dep_m_creditor_item creditor_item1 WHERE sc_dep_m_creditor.DEPOSIT_TYPE_CODE = SC_DEP_M_RULE.DEPOSIT_TYPE_CODE and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no = creditor_item1.deposit_account_no and creditor_item1.seq_no = ( select max(creditor_item2.seq_no) from sc_dep_m_creditor_item creditor_item2 where creditor_item1.deposit_account_no = creditor_item2.deposit_account_no and creditor_item2.operate_date <= '!apply_date_1!' ) AND sc_dep_m_creditor.close_status <> 'C' ) tab_dep on SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.membership_no = tab_dep.membership_no WHERE SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.membership_no = {0}

r_ktm_book_shrlon_stroiet_wvo_nest_share.sql: select share_det1.share_stock from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail share_det1 where share_det1.seq_no = ( select max(share_det2.seq_no) from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail share_det2 where share_det2.membership_no = share_det1.membership_no and share_det2.operate_date <= '!apply_date_1!' ) and share_det1.membership_no = {0}
